steps.title: Identify the interior angle
steps.content: Lines q and r are parallel and are crossed by transversal s. The angle vertical to the marked $77^{\circ}$ angle has measure $77^{\circ}$ and lies inside the parallel lines.

steps.title: Use same-side interior angles
steps.content: That $77^{\circ}$ interior angle and the $y^{\circ}$ angle are same-side interior angles, so they are supplementary: $$77+y=180.$$ Thus, $$y=103.$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content: Given $y=2x+7$, substitute $103$ for $y$: $$103=2x+7.$$ Then $$96=2x,$$ so $$x=48.$$ C is correct.
